description: Design quality evaluation criteria — category score distribution, check items, and thresholds

region_placement.description: Whether elements are placed in the correct region (header/body/footer)

grid_alignment.description: Whether element left edges align to the 12-column grid (tolerance: 4px)

safe_area.description: Whether essential content is within the safe area

overlap_detection.description: Whether there are no abnormal overlaps between content elements

font_allowed.description: Whether only allowed fonts are used

size_in_range.description: Whether font sizes per role are within the allowed range

text_overflow.description: Whether text does not overflow its container

hierarchy_valid.description: Whether title > subtitle > body size hierarchy is maintained

palette_usage.description: Whether only design system palette colors are used

contrast_aa.description: Whether text-background contrast meets WCAG AA standard (4.5:1)

color_consistency.description: Whether the same color is used for the same role across slides

required_elements_present.description: Whether all required elements for the slide type are present

min_element_diversity.description: Whether at least 2 different element types are used per slide

data_viz_accuracy.description: Whether chart/table data is valid and complete

whitespace_ratio.description: Whether whitespace ratio is within the 25-45% range

element_distribution.description: Whether elements are evenly distributed without being biased to one side

hierarchy_clarity.description: Whether visual hierarchy is clear (differentiated by size/weight/color)

shape_type_valid.description: Whether used shape names are valid MSO_SHAPE types

emu_bounds.description: Whether converted EMU values are within valid bounds

effect_params_valid.description: Whether effect parameters (blur, distance, etc.) are within valid ranges

data_attribute_valid.description: Whether data-pptx-* attributes have correct format

color_consistency.description: Same color used for same role across all slides

font_consistency.description: Same font/size used for same role across all slides

spacing_consistency.description: Consistent margins/spacing in same regions across all slides
